description.description: LLM friendly description of the tool

parameters.description: The parameters for the tool. Each key is the name of the parameter and the value is the parameter object.

possibleValues.description: The possible values for the parameter. Can contain only primitive values or arrays of primitive values.

properties.description: When type is 'object', this describes the structure of the object.

type.description: Parameter type (string, number, boolean, object, array)
